steps.t: Captain Brackenbrook is in the town of Archet, near The Mad Badger Inn. You should speak with Captain Brackenbrook on Strider's behalf and try to conv…
The townsfolk of Archet are standing around the town, the presence of Ranger guests having drawn their attention. You should speak to the townsfolk to…
Strider is in the town of Archet, awaiting word. You should speak with Strider and tell him of Captain Brackenbrook's folly.
